# Lucho Escobedo

> Data and AI executive with 20 years designing and
> scaling enterprise systems that convert data into
> decisions, value, and durable competitive advantage
> — across McKinsey, Fortune 500 corporations, and
> unicorn startups like REEF Technology, spanning four
> continents. Founder and investor across ventures in
> AI consulting, real estate, small business acquisition,
> and B2B commerce infrastructure. Fulbright Scholar.
> PhD in Geospatial Economics, University of Illinois
> at Urbana-Champaign. Based in Lima, Peru.

## About

- [Lucho Escobedo](https://luchoescobedo.com):
  Executive profile, ventures, career history,
  and contact.

## Writing

### Institutional Intelligence
Weekly column on AI, strategy, and organizational
decision-making for executives. Written from Peru,
interpreting global technological shifts through
a Latin American lens. For investors, CEOs, policy
makers, and founders with institutional
responsibility over the region. English only.

- [Institutional Intelligence](https://luchoescobedo.com/institutional-intelligence/):
  Column index and all published essays.
- [The Clarity Gap](https://luchoescobedo.com/institutional-intelligence/2026/the-clarity-gap/):
  Launch essay. Why Latin America's place in the
  new technological order turns on clarity rather
  than access to AI.

### The Wolf's Den
Personal essays on discipline, identity,
leadership, and the person behind the work.
English only.

- [The Wolf's Den](https://luchoescobedo.com/blog/):
  Personal writing archive.

## Ventures

- [Kipu](https://kipuai.com): Data and AI consulting
  firm serving Latin America and the Caribbean.
  Partner: Lucho Escobedo.
- [Green Street Holdings](https://greenstreet-holding.com):
  Real estate and small business acquisition firm.
  Founder and Managing Partner: Lucho Escobedo.
- [Prime Deals](https://primedeals.global): B2B commerce
  infrastructure platform powered by PrimeOS.
  Founder: Lucho Escobedo.

## Professional Presence

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/luchoescobedo/):
  Weekly column in Spanish on AI and Latin America.
  Professional updates and thought leadership.
